items.name: 1,2-HEXANEDIOL
items.why: A gentle, multi-functional preservative booster and humectant that is much safer and less irritating than parabens.
items.what: Helps preserve the formula and adds moisture to the skin.

items.name: Acrylates Copolymer
items.why: To create the perfect texture that isn’t too runny or too thick.
items.what: Functions as a texture enhancer and film-former to keep the product stable on your skin.

items.name: Adenosine
items.why: A powerhouse soothing and anti-aging ingredient derived from yeast.
items.what: Energizes the skin’s surface to look smoother and younger while calming inflammation.

items.name: Allantoin
items.why: The ultimate skin-soother found in the Comfrey plant.
items.what: Prevents irritation, heals the skin barrier, and keeps skin calm.

items.name: Aluminum Hydroxide
items.why: Used to coat our Titanium Dioxide particles in the sunscreen.
items.what: Helps the sunscreen spread evenly and prevents it from reacting with other ingredients.

items.name: Arginine
items.why: An amino acid that naturally exists in the body.
items.what: Acts as a pH adjuster to ensure the formula is compatible with your skin, while offering antioxidant benefits.

items.name: Ascorbyl Glucoside
items.why: A stable form of Vitamin C that brightens without the sting.
items.what: Fades dark spots and boosts radiance.

items.name: BHT
items.why: A potent antioxidant used in tiny amounts to protect the product itself.
items.what: Prevents the ingredients from oxidizing (going bad/smelling rancid).

items.name: Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine
items.why: One of the most advanced broad-spectrum UV filters available today.
items.what: Absorbs both UVA and UVB rays to protect skin from aging and burning.

items.name: Butylene Glycol
items.why: A texture enhancer that makes the product feel light, not sticky.
items.what: Helps ingredients dissolve and penetrate while adding hydration

items.name: C12-20 Alkyl Glucoside & C14-22 Alcohols
items.why: A gentle emulsifying pair that mimics the skin’s lipid structure.
items.what: Mixes oil and water ingredients together to create a smooth cream.

items.name: Calcium Gluconate
items.why: A mineral supplement for the skin.
items.what: Helps soothe the skin and maintain barrier function.

items.name: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride
items.why: A silky oil derived from coconut that never feels greasy.
items.what: Moisturizes and replenishes the skin surface.

items.name: Caprylyl Glycol
items.why: A humectant that doubles as a preservative booster.
items.what: Softens the skin and keeps bacteria out of the jar.

items.name: Carbomer
items.why: The ingredient responsible for the satisfying “gel” texture.
items.what: Thickens water-based formulas into a gel that holds moisture.

items.name: Ceramide NP
items.why: The essential building block of a healthy skin barrier.
items.what: Rebuilds the “mortar” between skin cells to lock in hydration.

items.name: Cetearyl Alcohol
items.why: A “good” fatty alcohol (not the drying kind!) that softens skin.
items.what: Gives creams their white, fluffy consistency and moisturizes.

items.name: Cetyl PEG/PPG-10/1 Dimethicone
items.why: A silicone-based emulsifier.
items.what: Helps water mix with silicones for a silky, spreadable texture.

items.name: Choleth-24
items.why: An emulsifier specifically used for our Ceramide complex.
items.what: Helps ceramides dissolve in water so they can absorb into your skin.

items.name: Cyanocobalamin
items.why: The vitamin that gives our cleansing serum its natural pink color.
items.what: Soothes sensitive skin and supports skin health.

items.name: Cyclohexasiloxane & Cyclopentasiloxane
items.why: Lightweight, volatile silicones that evaporate after application.
items.what: Allows the product to spread easily and then “set” to a velvet finish.

items.name: Dibutyl Adipate
items.why: A clear, oil-like solvent.
items.what: Helps dissolve UV filters so the sunscreen is smooth, not gritty.

items.name: Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate
items.why: A superior photostable chemical sunscreen filter.
items.what: Provides high protection specifically against UVA rays (aging rays).

items.name: Dimethyl Isosorbide
items.why: A smart solvent that boosts penetration.
items.what: Helps ingredients like HPR penetrate deeper into the skin without irritation.

items.name: Diphenylsiloxy Phenyl Trimethicone
items.why: A premium silicone emollient.
items.what: Provides a long-lasting, glossy (but not oily) feel to the skin.

items.name: Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate
items.why: An active compound from Licorice that is amazing for redness.
items.what: Gives creams their white, fluffy consistency and moisturizes.

items.name: Dipropylene Glycol
items.what: Gives creams their white, fluffy consistency and moisturizes.

items.name: Disodium EDTA
items.why: Chelating agents that keep the formula “clean”.
items.what: Gives creams their white, fluffy consistency and moisturizes.

items.name: Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate
items.why: A classic UVB filter.
items.what: Protects the skin from UVB rays (burning rays)

items.name: Ethylhexyl Palmitate
items.why: A texture enhancer derived from palm oil.
items.what: Boosts the SPF capability of other sunscreen ingredients.

items.name: Ethylhexyl Salicylate
items.why: A liquid UVB filter.
items.what: Protects the skin from UVB rays (burning rays)

items.name: Ethylhexylglycerin
items.why: A skin-softening preservative booster
items.what: Keeps the formula safe from bacteria while conditioning the skin.

items.name: Glycerin
items.why: The gold standard of hydration.
items.what: Draws moisture into the skin to keep it plump.

items.name: Glyceryl Glucoside
items.why: A next-gen hydrator that targets Aquaporins (water channels).
items.what: Distributes moisture to deeper layers of the skin.

items.name: Glycine Soja (Soybean) Oil
items.why: An antioxidant-rich plant oil
items.what: Smoothes skin and protects it from environmental damage.

items.name: Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil
items.why: A non-comedogenic oil rich in Linoleic Acid.
items.what: Repairs the barrier and breaks down makeup in cleansers.

items.name: Hydrogenated Lecithin
items.why: An emulsifier with a structure similar to skin cells.
items.what: Repairs the barrier and helps actives absorb better.

items.name: Hydroxyacetophenone
items.why: An antioxidant that also stabilizes the formula.
items.what: Soothes skin and boosts the effectiveness of preservatives.

items.name: Hydroxypinacolone Retinoate
items.why: The “Greenflag” Retinoid
items.what: Anti-aging and anti-acne without the irritation of traditional retinol.

items.name: Isododecane & Isohexadecane
items.why: Ultra-lightweight solvents.
items.what: Makes heavy formulas feel weightless and matte.

items.name: Magnesium Chloride
items.why: A mineral salt.
items.what: Helps improve skin barrier recovery.

items.name: Niacinamide
items.why: The multitasking superstar.
items.what: Brightens, controls oil, strengthens barrier, and soothes.

items.name: Panthenol
items.why: The soothing healer.
items.what: Calms redness and heals the skin barrier.

items.name: Pentaerythrityl Tetraethylhexanoate
items.why: A high-performance emollient.
items.what: Gives a cushiony, luxurious feel to the serum.

items.name: Pentylene Glycol
items.why: A moisture-binding solvent.
items.what: Hydrates and protects the formula from bacteria.

items.name: Phenoxyethanol
items.why: A gentle, globally approved preservative.
items.what: Keeps the product safe from dangerous bacteria and mold.

items.name: Polyglyceryl-10 Behenate/Eicosadioate
items.why: A plant-based emulsifier.
items.what: Stabilizes the oil-to-milk transformation in our cleanser.

items.name: Polymethylsilsesquioxane
items.why: Spherical powder particles.
items.what: Provides a “soft-focus” effect to blur pores and creates a non-sticky finish.

items.name: Propanediol
items.why: A natural alternative to propylene glycol.
items.what: Hydrates skin and improves ingredient absorption.

items.name: Pyridoxine HCl
items.why: A vitamin essential for skin balance.
items.what: Helps regulate sebum and maintain healthy skin.

items.name: Retinol
items.why: The gold standard of anti-aging.
items.what: Increases cell turnover to treat wrinkles and acne.

items.name: Silica
items.why: A natural mineral powder.
items.what: Absorbs excess oil and prevents sunscreen from feeling greasy.

items.name: Sodium Chloride
items.what: Used to thicken and stabilize the texture of water-in-oil emulsions.

items.name: Sodium Hyaluronate
items.why: The salt form of Hyaluronic Acid.
items.what: Draws massive amounts of water into the skin.
